did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a data descriptor announcing the release of the OHSU MoleMapper dataset. It does not use AI, machine learning, or deep learning to obtain study results. The text explicitly states that the data are 'unlabelled' and that results related to building machine learning classifiers 'will be reported later in a final report.' The paper only discusses the potential future use of the data for pre-training networks or analyzing image quality.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
